listing.name: Noodle Seed
listing.tagline: Build and operate MCP apps on Noodle Cloud
listing.description: The developer's coding agent writes the application source while Noodle guides, validates, deploys, inspects, diagnoses, and rolls back apps on Noodle Cloud. The Cursor plugin combines the Noodle Seed authoring skill, a pinned managed CLI, local Build Readiness, and authenticated Noodle Cloud operations.

data_handling.oauth_grant_boundary: Cloud operations are limited to the organization and environments selected during authorization.
